examples:
Command Example
#
!ad-entries-search base_dn="dc=openldap,dc=demisto,dc=int" object_class=top,posixAccount search_filter="(creatorsName=cn=ldapadm,dc=openldap,dc=demisto,dc=int)" attributes=all_operational_attributes page=1 page_size=2
Human Readable Output
#
createTimestamp
creatorsName
dn

!ad-entries-search base_dn="dc=openldap,dc=demisto,dc=int" object_class=top,posixAccount search_filter="(creatorsName=cn=ldapadm,dc=openldap,dc=demisto,dc=int)" attributes=all_operational_attributes page=1 page_size=2
Human Readable Output
#
createTimestamp
creatorsName
dn
entryCSN
entryUUID

outputs.name: The context output will vary depending on the LDAP server scheme configuration and the attributes provided in the command.
